```python
hidden_string = str(metadata.get("hidden_string", "111"))
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and len(counts) > 0

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots

max_count = max(counts.values())
most_likely = [bitstring for bitstring, c in counts.items() if c == max_count]
assert hidden_string in most_likely

assert counts.get(hidden_string, 0) == shots
```

```python
hidden_string = str(metadata.get("hidden_string", "111"))
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"
assert hidden_string in counts, f"Expected measured bitstring {hidden_string!r} in counts, got {counts}"
assert counts[hidden_string] == shots, f"Expected all {shots} shots to measure {hidden_string!r}, got {counts[hidden_string]}"
assert sum(counts.values()) == shots, f"Counts should sum to shots={shots}, got {sum(counts.values())}"
```

```python
hidden_string = str(metadata.get("hidden_string", "111"))
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, f"total counts {total_counts} != shots {shots}"

assert counts[hidden_string] == shots, f"expected all shots to measure {hidden_string!r}, got {counts[hidden_string]} out of {shots}"

assert set(counts.keys()) == {hidden_string}, f"unexpected measurement outcomes: {counts}"
```

```python
hidden = str(metadata.get("hidden_string", "111"))
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and len(counts) > 0
assert hidden in counts, f"Expected hidden string {hidden!r} in counts, got {counts!r}"
assert counts[hidden] == max(counts.values()), f"Expected most frequent result to be {hidden!r}, got counts={counts!r}"
assert counts[hidden] == shots, f"Expected all {shots} shots to measure {hidden!r}, got {counts[hidden]!r}"
assert sum(counts.values()) == shots, f"Counts should sum to shots={shots}, got {sum(counts.values())}"
```

```python
hidden_string = str(metadata.get("hidden_string", "111"))
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"

observed = max(counts, key=counts.get)

total_shots = sum(counts.values())
assert total_shots == shots, f"Expected total counts to sum to shots={shots}, got {total_shots}"

assert counts.get(hidden_string, 0) == shots, (
    f"Bernstein-Vazirani should deterministically return {hidden_string}; "
    f"got counts={counts}"
)
```
